name: sap-commerce
description: Provides comprehensive SAP Commerce Cloud (formerly Hybris) development guidance including type system modeling, service layer architecture, data management with ImpEx and FlexibleSearch, OCC API customization, B2C/B2B accelerator patterns, CronJobs, business processes, Solr search, promotions, caching, and Backoffice configuration.
